content.en:
This immeasurable island is huge, even many times larger than the ordinary space-time territory in the space-time territory of the Source Sea, and the cultivation environment here is very good.

After Ye Tian entered this immeasurable island, he probed the copy talent and sensed a large number of cultivators, many of whom were cultivators of the Supreme Realm, but the existence of the Eternal Realm was still extremely rare, and it would be strange if the Eternal Realm was everywhere.

After all, no matter how powerful the Infinite Sea is, it is also an Eternal Sea, and it is the same as the Source Sea, which is essentially no different.

And this immeasurable island may just be an ordinary immeasurable island in the immeasurable sea, so it is normal that there is no eternal realm.

But.

After Ye Tian used his copying talent to probe around, he still found several Eternal Realms, but their strength was not very strong, and the most powerful Eternal Realm was only an Immortal Realm Lord.

Ye Tian hid his strength, inquired about the news on this immeasurable island, and quickly learned about the situation of this immeasurable island.

This immeasurable island is called the Thunder Turtle Holy Island, and it is one of the immeasurable islands under the command of Thunder River Lord 08, and the Thunder River Lord is a legendary lord.

Ye Tian didn't have much interest in Lord Thunder River, so he only inquired about the situation of the True No Holy Land, and after a long time of inquiry, he roughly inquired about the general location of the True No Holy Land.

Then, Ye Tian left here and shuttled in that direction.

After that, Ye Tian passed by several immeasurable islands, and after many inquiries, he finally knew the specific location of the True Saintless Land.

The True Infinite Holy Land is in a group of immeasurable islands, which is a super-large and prosperous area formed by a large number of immeasurable islands, many of which are eternal immeasurable islands, and such a place is a place where the real top powers must fight.

And the True Saintless Land is very powerful, so it naturally has the strength to occupy such a treasure land.

This treasure land is also known as the True Void Islands, but a long time ago, the Legendary Realm powerhouses of the True Void Holy Land attracted the Infinite Sea Origin in the surrounding area to form an origin barrier.

As a result, many weaker cultivators did not understand the situation of the True Void Islands and the True Void Holy Land at all.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the origin barrier outside the True Void Islands, and countless Infinite Sea Origin Energy flew out from the Infinite Sea, forming a water curtain barrier that spread across the sky, blocking the cultivators who entered the True Void Islands.

Ye Tian lightly touched the origin barrier, it was very tough, and without the strength above the Eight Extremes Realm or the Constant Realm, it was indeed impossible to break through this barrier.

Crash!

Ye Tian gently tore through this layer of origin barrier, and stepped into the area where the True Void Islands were located.

"Lots of islands!

Ye Tian exclaimed.

As far as he could see, he only felt a slight sense of the existence of tens of thousands of immeasurable islands in the distance, and among them there were thousands of huge islands of eternal time and space.

When he approached these immeasurable islands, Ye Tian also saw a famous Eternal Realm shuttling on the immeasurable sea between the immeasurable islands.

It seems that the existence of the Eternal Realm here is very common, there are many, many Eternal Realm existences here, and even the Legendary Realm Lord is nothing here.

Ye Tian casually entered an immeasurable island.He was not subject to any scrutiny, as a source sea life, his aura was somewhat incompatible with the immeasurable sea, so it was easy to see that he was not a person from the immeasurable sea, but many other eternal sea beings would enter the immeasurable sea, so no one would care about this, unless it was another Eternal Sea powerhouse in the legendary realm who came here, it would be focused on.

And the Legendary Lord of the Initial Realm will not be so concerned by the True Saintless Land.

Ye Tian was mainly inquiring about how to join the True Void Holy Land in the True Void Islands, and he didn't care much about other news.

Soon, he found out the information.

The True Absence Holy Land itself has a very large number of disciples, and the native residents of the True Absence Islands have provided a large number of disciple candidates for the True Absence Holy Land, so there is really no shortage of disciples in the True Absence Holy Land, but outsiders can also join the True No Holy Land, but the True No Holy Land has extremely high requirements for outsiders.

First of all, you must not join the legendary forces of the Infinite Sea, and the second cultivation must reach the Eternal Realm.

As for the cultivators under the Eternal Realm, no matter how high your talent is, it is useless, in case you can't break through to the Eternal Realm, no matter how strong your combat power is, it will only be a waste.

It's like many eight-pole realm half-step Eternal Realm powerhouses, it seems to be very awesome, but if they can't break through, their whole life will be like this, and the rules of the Infinite Sea are similar to the space-time territory, and if they don't reach the Eternal Realm, they also have a lifespan.

Therefore, for cultivators who do not accept the Eternal Realm in the True Holy Land, the minimum threshold for joining is the Eternal Realm.

The above two requirements are the most basic requirements, but they are not standards.

If you want to join the True Void Holy Land, you must either have the recommendation of the high-level of the True Void Holy Land, or you must break through the True Void Holy Tower.

The True-Void Saint Tower is a building that tests the combat power of the True-Void Holy Land, the stronger the strength, the stronger the opponent encountered in the True-Void Saint Tower, so it is not that the higher the strength, you can break into the higher 110 floors.

And the external requirement of the True Void Holy Land is that you must pass through the ninth layer of the True Void Holy Pagoda before you can join the True Void Holy Land

In addition, it is forbidden to use any powerful secret treasures and weapons, such as the Eternal Treasure.

The True Void Tower is very lively in the True Void Islands, because there are often outsiders who break into the True Void Tower, but very few Eternal Realms can break through the ninth layer, they just regard breaking through the True Void Pagoda as a standard to test their strength, if someone breaks into the tower is very high, if it is publicized, even if the True Void Holy Land is not accepted, there are other legendary-level forces that will come to woo them.

"There is not much time left for Yuanhai, I still have to break through the ninth layer of the True Void Holy Tower as soon as possible and become a member of the Truly Void Holy Land, if I join the Truly Innocent Holy Land, even the so-called Qin family will have to be afraid of me and dare not attack the Source Sea. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Wow!

Ye Tian came to the eternal immeasurable island where the True Void Holy Pagoda was located, Barwen Island, which was one of the main islands of the True Void Holy Land.

When Ye Tian appeared near the True Saintless Tower, there were already a lot of Eternal Realms here, and they were all watching the excitement, obviously there were many people breaking into the True Saintless Pagoda now.

Ye Tian did not rush into the True Saintless Pagoda, but watched from the side for a while.

After all, no matter how anxious you are, you are not in a hurry for this minute and a half. _
